# Database Structures and Enumerations | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CKTool JS ](/documentation/cktooljs)

-  Database Structures and Enumerations 

API Collection# Database Structures and Enumerations

## [Topics](/documentation/cktooljs/database-structures-and-enumerations#topics)

### [Structures](/documentation/cktooljs/database-structures-and-enumerations#Structures)

[`CKDBAsset`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbasset)An object that represents an asset uploaded to CloudKit.[`CKDBAssetUploadUrlResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbassetuploadurlresponse)An object that represents the results of creating an asset upload URL.[`CKDBChangeMetadata`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbchangemetadata)An object that represents metadata about a record change via creation or modification.[`CKDBCreateAssetUploadUrlRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbcreateassetuploadurlrequestbody)An object that represents the request for creating an asset upload URL.[`CKDBCreateRecordRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbcreaterecordrequestbody)An object that represents the request to create a new record.[`CKDBCreateZoneRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbcreatezonerequestbody)An object that represents the request to create a new zone.[`CKDBDeleteRecordsByQueryRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbdeleterecordsbyqueryrequestbody)An object that represents the request to delete multiple records that match a query.[`CKDBDeletedRecordResult`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbdeletedrecordresult)An object that represents a deleted record result.[`CKDBErrorRecordResult`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdberrorrecordresult)An object that represents a record lookup failure.[`CKDBExistingRecordResult`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbexistingrecordresult)An object that represents a successful record result.[`CKDBForRecord`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbforrecord)An object that represents a record that is being shared.[`CKDBLocation`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdblocation)An object that represents a location field value.[`CKDBLookupRecordsRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdblookuprecordsrequestbody)An object that represents the request for looking up multiple records by record name.[`CKDBLookupRecordsResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdblookuprecordsresponse)An object that represents the results of a batch record lookup operation.[`CKDBModifyRecordRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbmodifyrecordrequestbody)An object that represents the request for updating an existing record.[`CKDBNullableReference`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbnullablereference)An object that represents a reference to another record.[`CKDBPagedBatchDeleteResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbpagedbatchdeleteresponse)An object that represents the results of a paginated batch delete operation.[`CKDBQuery`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbquery)An object that represents a query for searching records.[`CKDBQueryFilter`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbqueryfilter)An object that represents the logical conditions for determining whether a record matches the query.[`CKDBQueryRecordsRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbqueryrecordsrequestbody)An object that represents the request for fetching multiple records that match a query.[`CKDBQuerySort`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbquerysort)An object that represents a sort descriptor that specifies how to order fetched records.[`CKDBRecord`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecord)An object that represents a record in a database.[`CKDBRecordChangesRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordchangesrequestbody)An object that represents the request for fetching changes since a specified zone change token.[`CKDBRecordChangesResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordchangesresponse)An object that represents the results of a record changes lookup operation.[`CKDBRecordReference`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordreference)An object that represents a reference to a CloudKit database record.[`CKDBRecordResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordresponse)An object that represents the results of a record lookup operation.[`CKDBRecordResult`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordresult)An object that represents a record when the lookup operation can potentially return deleted records or fail partially when looking up some of the record.[`CKDBRecordsResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordsresponse)An object that represents the results of a batch record lookup operation.[`CKDBResolveRecordRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbresolverecordrequestbody)An object that represents a request for fetching a record given its `shortGuid`.[`CKDBResolveRecordResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbresolverecordresponse)An object that represents the results of looking up a record by its `shortGuid`.[`CKDBResolvedRecord`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbresolvedrecord)An object that represents a shared record fetched using its `shortGuid`.[`CKDBSchemaImportRequestBody`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbschemaimportrequestbody)An object that contains a schema file to be applied to a container environment.[`CKDBSessionUser`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbsessionuser)An object that represents the current user.[`CKDBSessionUserResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbsessionuserresponse)An object that contains the result of looking up the current user.[`CKDBShareParticipant`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbshareparticipant)An object that represents a share participant.[`CKDBSharePotentialParticipant`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbsharepotentialparticipant)An object that represents a potential participant for a share.[`CKDBStableUrl`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbstableurl)Internal use only.[`CKDBStreamingAsset`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbstreamingasset)A streaming asset object that represents a streaming asset in CloudKit.[`CKDBUserIdentity`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbuseridentity)An object that identifies a user participating in a share.[`CKDBUserIdentityLookupInfo`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbuseridentitylookupinfo)An object that represents lookup information for a user.[`CKDBUserNameComponents`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbusernamecomponents)An object that represents the user’s name.[`CKDBValidateSchemaResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbvalidateschemaresponse)The response object after validating the uploaded schema string.[`CKDBZone`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbzone)An object that represents a CloudKit database zone.[`CKDBZoneId`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbzoneid)An object that represents a CloudKit database zone identifier.[`CKDBZoneResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbzoneresponse)An object that represents results of fetching a zone.[`CKDBZonesResponse`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbzonesresponse)An object that represents results of fetching multiple zones.### [Enumerations](/documentation/cktooljs/database-structures-and-enumerations#Enumerations)

[`CKDBPermissionType`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbpermissiontype)The participant’s read and write permissions.[`CKDBQueryFilterType`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbqueryfiltertype)An object that represents the type of a filter that indicates the comparison operator when applying the filter.[`CKDBQuerySortOrder`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbquerysortorder)An enumeration that represents the order to use when sorting records.[`CKDBRecordReferenceAction`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbrecordreferenceaction)An object that represents the action to be performed for the referenced record.[`CKDBShareAcceptanceStatus`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbshareacceptancestatus)An enumeration that indicates the status of accepting the shared record.[`CKDBShareParticipantType`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbshareparticipanttype)An enumeration that represents the type of a share participant.## [See Also](/documentation/cktooljs/database-structures-and-enumerations#see-also)
